title: habenaria robustior
intro: Habenaria robustior, also known as the "tall yellow pansy orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Habenaria robustior include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe coughs, and reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
